prompt: CRM for a real estate agency. Agents manage leads, properties, and deals. WhatsApp notifications when a deal closes.
original_prompt: CRM for a real estate agency. Agents manage leads, properties, and deals. WhatsApp notifications when a deal closes.

assumptions: The CRM is for a single real estate agency
Agents are the primary users of the CRM
WhatsApp notifications are sent when a deal is closed
questions: Will the CRM be used by multiple real estate agencies, or just one?
Are there any other user roles besides agents that will be using the CRM?
What kind of analytics or reporting features are required for the CRM?

entities.name: deals
entities.description: Represents a deal between a lead and a property

relations.description: A lead can have multiple deals
A property can have multiple deals
An agent can manage multiple leads
An agent can manage multiple properties
An agent can manage multiple deals

business_rules.name: deal_closure_notification
business_rules.description: Send WhatsApp notification when a deal is closed

data_flows.name: deal_closure_notification
data_flows.description: Send WhatsApp notification when a deal is closed

errors.description: The updated_at field in the agents table does not have a default value of NOW() or a similar timestamp function to track when the record was last updated.
The API endpoint /agents/{id} does not have a validation rule to check if the agent_id exists in the agents table before updating or deleting an agent.
The form on the /leads/create page does not have a field for the agent_id, which is a required field in the leads table.
The permissions matrix does not define permissions for the 'deals' resource, which could lead to unauthorized access or modification of deal data.

warnings.description: The soft_deleted_at field in the leads table is nullable, but it may be better to use a separate table to store soft-deleted records to improve query performance.
The API endpoint /properties does not have a validation rule to check if the property_id exists in the properties table before creating or updating a property.
The form on the /deals/create page does not have a field for the close_date, which is a required field in the deals table.

conflicts.description: The permissions matrix defines permissions for the 'agents' resource, but the API endpoints for agents do not have authentication or authorization checks.
conflicts.resolution_strategy: Add authentication and authorization checks to the API endpoints for agents to ensure that only authorized users can access or modify agent data.

repairs.error_description: The updated_at field in the agents table does not have a default value of NOW() or a similar timestamp function to track updates.
The API endpoint for updating an agent does not specify the HTTP method (e.g., PATCH or PUT) for updating an existing agent resource.
The create lead form does not include a field for the agent_id, which is a required field in the leads table.
The permissions matrix does not specify permissions for the 'admin' role to manage deals, properties, or leads.

blocking_issues: The create property form does not include a field for the agent_id, which is a required field in the properties table.
The permissions matrix does not specify permissions for the 'admin' role to manage deals, properties, or leads.
warnings: The soft_deleted_at field in the leads table is nullable, but it may be more effective to use a separate 'deleted' table to track deleted leads.
The API endpoint for creating a new deal does not specify the required fields for the request body.

workflow_stubs.name: Trigger WhatsApp via Twilio when deals status changed

mermaid_diagrams.er_diagram:
erDiagram
    Agent }|..|{ Lead : manages
    Agent }|..|{ Property : manages
    Agent }|..|{ Deal : manages
    Lead }|..|{ Property : associated_with
    Property }|..|{ Deal : associated_with
    Deal }|..|{ Lead : associated_with
mermaid_diagrams.api_sequence:
sequenceDiagram
    participant Agent as Agent
    participant Lead as Lead
    participant Property as Property
    participant Deal as Deal
    Agent->>Lead: Create Lead
    Lead->>Property: Associate Property
    Property->>Deal: Associate Deal
    Deal->>Lead: Update Lead Status
    Agent->>Deal: Close Deal
    Deal->>Agent: Send WhatsApp Notification
